blocks.text: After a rough Valspar for all three Norwegians — Reitan T75, Ventura T82, Hovland T90 — Houston is a reset round. The Masters is two weeks away.
♟️ Wed — Magnus Carlsen opens FIDE Candidates Tournament bid — World Championship challenger at stake
🏎️ Fri — Japanese GP at Suzuka; Russell leads Antonelli by just 4pts in early 2026 title fight
